content:
| Category | Glyph Type Options | Examples (proposed) |
|----------------|-------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Artist IDs | Custom Symbol / Emoji / ASCII | ::4_bl00m = “∞” or “⚙️” |
| Projects | Project-Specific Glyphs | ::GR1ND3R = “⛓️”, ::MET4 = “♾️”, etc. |
| Logic Modes | Emoji / Tag | Dream = “☁️” / Reality = “⚒️” / Hybrid = “⚖️” |
| Media Domains | Domain Glyphs | Audio = “🎵” / Myth = “⚱️” / Visual = “🖼️” |
| Output Types | Output Glyphs | Ritual = “✝️” / Product = “📦” / Archive = “🗂️” |

---

### III. | SYMBOL ENGINE V1

We will begin with:
- Emoji-based starter system (for prototyping)
- Add ASCII symbol logic for plaintext and markdown compatibility
- Reserve space for custom SVG icon development (if desired later)
